scripts.test:visual:docker: docker compose -f docker-compose.visual.yml run --rm visual yarn test:visual
scripts.test:visual:update:docker: docker compose -f docker-compose.visual.yml run --rm visual yarn test:visual:update
scripts.test:visual:watch:docker: docker compose -f docker-compose.visual.yml run --rm visual sh -lc "rm -f /workspace/visual_regression/test/.visual-watch.lock && node test/visual/watch.js"
